{{Quote|A great deal of cargo traffic is passing between Fondor and Gandeal. The CMG member surmises that new hyperlanes have been opened by the Empire to serve the system, judging by the number of bulk freighters passing into and out of the shipyards.|[[Independent Traders' Infonet/Legends|Independent Traders' Infonet]]|<ref name="GNN5">{{JournalCite|5|Galaxywide NewsNets}}</ref>}}
'''Gandeal''' was a [[Planet/Legends|Planet]] in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] and partner planet to the world of [[Fondor/Legends|Fondor]], a fortress world situated on the [[Corellian Trade Spine/Legends|Corellian Trade Spine]].<ref name="TEA" />

It was one of the endpoints of the [[Gandeal-Fondor Hyperlane]], which the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] established to export raw materials from Gandeal to the [[Fondor Shipyards/Legends|Fondor Shipyards]] and Gandeal was used as a checkpoint of [[Bulk freighter/Legends|bulk freighters]].<ref name="TEA" />

{{Planet-stub}}
